query:
SELECT id, runType, status, startedAt, completedAt, durationMs, 
       feedsFetched, feedErrors, articlesIngested, projectsCreated,
       failureReason, triggeredBy
FROM pipelineRuns 
ORDER BY startedAt DESC 
LIMIT 10;
